ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the neighborhood */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median house value in the neighborhood */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent in the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the neighborhood */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_postal_code FOREIGN KEY ("postal_code") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postal_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province name */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the borough */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the postal code belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the postal code area */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the postal code area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the amenity belongs to */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., school, park, store) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the amenity */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the amenity */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_amenities_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
column_names: Borough where the neighborhood is located
Median house value in the neighborhood

URL of an image representing the neighborhood
